title: App Settings - General - Account - Invite sent, user logs during the installation, not registered on Cloud
scenario: IT admin invite not accepted via external source results in mobile user logged in but missing tenant info on General/Account screen
steps: 1. As an IT admin, send an invite to a mobile user via an outside source (e.g., laptop).
2. On the mobile device, install the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. During onboarding, log in with the invited user's credentials.
4. Navigate to the Account screen (Home → Account).
expected: The user should see Tenant ID and Tenant Name rows on the account card, and the user should be registered on the cloud with the tenant.
